pages.title: 关于
pages.text: 我名叫小刘，20岁，在黑龙江省。未婚，我在东北林业大学上学。我不抽烟，不喝酒，晚上11点睡，每天要睡足8个小时。睡前我一定喝一杯温牛奶，然后做20分钟的柔软操，上了床马上熟睡。一觉到天亮，绝不把疲劳和压力留到第二天，医生都说我很正常！

posts.title: Hello World
posts.text: Welcome to hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub. Quick StartCreate a new post1$ hexo new "My New Post" More info: Writing Run server1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435/*我们想实现一个递增队列，就需要每次把滑动窗口新的元素从队尾开始比较，如果比队尾大，队尾元素就出队，最后入队新元素下标。每次滑动窗口输出队首对应的最大值，还要注意队首的下标是否被淘汰*/class Solution {public: vector<int> maxInWindows(const vector<int>& num, unsigned int size) { vector<int>res; deque<int>s; int r,l; r=l=0; for(;r<num.size();r++){ if(s.empty()){ s.push_back(r);//插入下标 } else { while(1){ if(num[r]>=num[s.back()]){ s.pop_back(); if(s.empty())break; } else break; } s.push_back(r); } if(r-l==size-1){ res.push_back(num[s.front()]); if(s.front()==l){ s.pop_front(); } l++; } } return res; }}; More info: Server Generate static files1hexo generate More info: Generating Deploy to remote sites1hexo deploy More info: Deployment
